testcase.name: test_auto_identify_duplicate_prevention

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 'already_running', got 'started' assert 'started' == 'already_running'
- already_running + started

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auto_identify_background.py:160: in test_auto_identify_duplicate_prevention assert data2.get("status") == "already_running", f"Expected 'already_running', got '{data2.get('status')}'" E AssertionError: Expected 'already_running', got 'started' E assert 'started' == 'already_running' E E - already_running E + started
